title: Fix empty path validation in 3 backends
description: Add empty path validation to AgenticStoreBackend (src/backends/agentic-store.ts), MemoryStorage (src/backends/memory.ts), and LocalStorageBackend (src/backends/local-storage.ts). Each backend's set/get/delete methods must throw an error when path is empty string. NodeFsBackend already does this correctly. Required by DBB-003. Unblocks task-1775565205056.
